Container.Name: Slopsmith Demucs Server
Container.Overview:
A standalone GPU-accelerated companion server for Slopsmith. Offloads PyTorch/Demucs stem-splitting and Whisper lyrics alignment tasks to a separate CUDA-capable GPU.
IMPORTANT GPU PASSTHROUGH INSTRUCTIONS: To enable GPU acceleration, you must have the Unraid NVIDIA Driver plugin installed. Under Docker Advanced View, add the following to your Extra Parameters: --gpus all
Container.Description: A standalone GPU-accelerated companion server for Slopsmith. Offloads PyTorch/Demucs stem-splitting and Whisper lyrics alignment tasks to a separate CUDA-capable GPU.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: The port for the Demucs Server REST API (defaulted to 8020)

Config.Name: Appdata Directory
Config.Description: Location for config DB, caches (art, audio, sloppak), and persistent pip packages.

Config.Name: PORT Env
Config.Description: Internal port the Demucs server listens to inside the container

Config.Name: CONFIG_DIR Env
Config.Description: Internal application environment variable for appdata config
